capability: the novelty reserve tracks the recent novelty rate of the signal's own history
note: BLIND. Item ids are opaque and the order is mixed; the condition (turnover/stable, newcomer/confirm) lives only in key.json, which the measure script never reads. `sense` and `partials` are structural routing (which organ ingests the item), not the held answer. Each item is a sequence of units; the last unit is the probe.
